mapper.select: SELECT mc.*, u.name as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM minute_comments mc LEFT JOIN users u ON mc.user_id = u.id WHERE mc.id = #{id}
SELECT mc.*, u.name as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM minute_comments mc LEFT JOIN users u ON mc.user_id = u.id WHERE mc.minute_id = #{minuteId} ORDER BY mc.created_time ASC
SELECT mc.*, u.name as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM minute_comments mc LEFT JOIN users u ON mc.user_id = u.id WHERE mc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY mc.created_time DESC
SELECT mc.*, u.name as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM minute_comments mc LEFT JOIN users u ON mc.user_id = u.id ORDER BY mc.created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO minute_comments (id, minute_id, user_id, content, parent_id, level, mentioned_users, created_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{minuteId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{level}, #{mentionedUsers}, #{createdTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE minute_comments SET user_id = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId}
